title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 265.120 - Rules for grading apples
text:
265.120.  Rules for grading apples. — The director shall, as provided in section 265.020, fix and promulgate rules for grading and classifying apples; provided, that such grades shall not conflict with any such grades or standards promulgated by the United States Department of Agriculture, except as marketing conditions in Missouri require the establishment of additional state grades.
(RSMo 1939 § 14301, A.L. 1993 S.B. 52)
